headline: TE Connectivity’s AI And Industrial Growth Story With Early ESG Milestone
summary: TE Connectivity (NYSE:TEL) reported strong Q1 FY2026 results, with substantial revenue and order growth. Management linked the performance to accelerating demand for AI data center connectivity solutions. The company also reported key advancements in its industrial solutions portfolio. TE Connectivity exceeded its 2025 corporate responsibility goals, particularly in renewable energy sourcing and sustainability initiatives. For you as an investor, TE Connectivity sits at the intersection of...
